summary.text: The task is: Search X for the latest tweets from:miroshark_ in the last 3 days. Return the 5 most interesting or substantive tweets. For each: full text, date, direct link (https://x.com/miroshark_/st...

content.text:
**Here are the 5 most interesting/substantive tweets** from @miroshark_ in the last 3 days (July 10–13, 2026), excluding retweets and low-value link-only posts:

- **Full text**: Run the future before it happens.  
  LLMs predict the next word, not the next week.  
  MiroShark casts everyone with a stake in your scenario as an agent - each with their own incentives.  
  They post, argue, bet, flip. Ten minutes later, you get a report on how it played out.  
  **Date**: Mon, 13 Jul 2026 14:44:43 GMT  
  **Direct link**: https://x.com/miroshark_/status/2076679218499403965

- **Full text**: MiroShark is now listed on the @base App 🦈  
  Drop in anything - a trade idea, a news headline or a question you can't answer - and MiroShark simulate the outcome with dozens of agents 👇  
  **Date**: Mon, 13 Jul 2026 13:50:44 GMT  
  **Direct link**: https://x.com/miroshark_/status/2076665633756864732

- **Full text**: We have a new section on our website 🦈
